name: Demo Clinic receptionist

business.name: Demo Clinic
business.description: A neighborhood clinic that answers patient questions and schedules routine appointments.

personaSource.generatorPrompt: Create realistic callers for a clinic receptionist. Include general information seekers, availability checkers, and visitors ready to book.

personas.label: General information seeker
goals: Ask whether the clinic accepts new patients.

personas.label: Appointment scheduler
goals: Find an appointment for a cleaning.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search public business knowledge for a concise answer.

tools.name: check_availability
tools.description: Check available appointment slots for a requested service.

tools.name: book_appointment
tools.description: Book an appointment slot for a visitor.

conversationGoals: Answer public business questions directly when enough information is available.
Use tools for factual lookup, appointment availability, and confirmed bookings.
Confirm important appointment details before closing the conversation.

stopWhen: The user has received the requested answer.
The booking is confirmed or the next step is clear.
escalationCriteria: The user asks for clinical advice.

systemPrompt: You are a helpful front-desk assistant for Demo Clinic. Be concise, use tools when needed, and avoid medical advice.
